arts.ttl: Do miracles come this big for Aberdeen against Celtic?
arts.sum: Should Aberdeen beat Celtic in Saturday's Scottish Cup final, it will will take its place in the dusty annals of Hampden giant kills, writes Tom English.

arts.ttl: What channel is Aberdeen vs Celtic? Free live stream, TV, ref, VAR and Scottish Cup Final team news
arts.sum: The glamour end-of-season showdown at Hampden is almost upon us as Celts stand on the brink of another Treble

arts.ttl: How can Aberdeen stop Celtic and win Scottish Cup?
arts.sum: Aberdeen's recent record against Celtic and their recent form overall does not suggest they will offer much of a threat to the holders. But can they defy the odds?
